---
title: "getting-started"
author: "Andrew Lynch"
date: "2026-05-12"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Getting Started

## Syntax
## Tracks and windows
## Elements
### Primitive Elements
#### seq_point()
#### seq_line()
#### seq_segment()
#### seq_curve()
#### seq_path()
#### seq_poly()
#### seq_area()
#### seq_text()
### Composites
#### seq_bar()
#### seq_ribbon()
#### seq_density()
#### seq_tile()
#### seq_lollipop()
#### seq_gene()
#### seq_sequence()
#### seq_ideogram()
## Grid Layout
## Axes
## Legends

### GIAB HG008 Variants

```{r pressure, echo = FALSE}

calc_nearest_variant_dist <- function(gr) {
  gr <- sort(gr)
  gr <- gr[seqnames(gr) %in% seqnames(gr)[lengths(split(gr, seqnames(gr))) > 0]]
  seqlevels(gr) <- seqlevelsInUse(gr)
  
  result <- lapply(split(gr, seqnames(gr)), function(chr_gr) {
    if (length(chr_gr) == 0) return(chr_gr)
    pos <- start(chr_gr)
    dist <- c(diff(pos), NA_integer_)
    chr_gr$dist_to_next <- dist
    chr_gr
  })
  
  do.call(c, unname(result))
}

## SNV
smv <- VariantAnnotation::readVcfAsVRanges("/Volumes/ARC2/01-Inbox/GIAB_HG008/variants/HG008-T--HG008-N.snv.indel.final.v7.annotated.vcf.gz")
snv <- GenomicRanges::GRanges(smv[sampleNames(smv) == "HG008-T" & smv$TYPE == "SNV"])
snv$AF <- unlist(snv$AF)

snv <- calc_nearest_variant_dist(snv)
snv$dist_to_next_log <- log10(snv$dist_to_next)

## InDel
id <- GRanges(smv[sampleNames(smv) == "HG008-T" & smv$TYPE %in% c("DEL","INS")])
id$AF <- unlist(id$AF)
id <- calc_nearest_variant_dist(id)
id$dist_to_next_log <- log10(id$dist_to_next)

## SV
sv <- readVcf("/Volumes/ARC2/01-Inbox/GIAB_HG008/variants/NIST_HG008-T_somatic-stvar-CNV_DraftBenchmark_V0.5-20260318/GRCh38_HG008-T-V0.5_somatic-stvar_PASS.draftbenchmark.vcf.gz")
sv <- sv[seqnames(sv) %in% paste0("chr",c(1,22,"X"))]

## CNA
cna <- makeGRangesFromDataFrame(read.table("/Volumes/ARC2/01-Inbox/GIAB_HG008/variants/HG008-T--HG008-N.bicseq2.txt", sep = "\t", header = TRUE), keep.extra.columns = TRUE)

```


```{r}
windows = create_genome_windows(paste0(c("1", "2")))
cb = load_cytobands()

layout = ""

p <- seq_plot(aesthetics = aes(window.gap.width = 0), plot_margin = c(0.05,0.05,0.05,0.1), highlight_margins = F) %|%
  seq_track(windows = windows, track_outer_margin = c(0.05,0.05,0,0), window_inner_margin  = 0.01, window_outer_margin = 0, scale_y  = seq_scale_continuous(limits = c(-2, 1), cap = "exact", expand = c(0,0))) %+%
  seq_segment(data = cna, map(y = log2.copyRatio, y_end = log2.copyRatio), aes(lwd = 1.5)) %__%
  seq_track(windows = windows, track_outer_margin = c(0.01,0.05,0,0), window_inner_margin = 0.01, window_outer_margin = 0, scale_y = seq_scale_continuous(cap = "full"), scale_x = seq_scale_genomic(windows = windows, cap = "capped")) %+%
  seq_point(data = snv, map(y = AF, color = AF), aes(size = 0.2, alpha = 0.9)) %__%
  seq_track(windows = windows, track_outer_margin = c(0,0.05,0,0), window_inner_margin = 0.01, window_outer_margin = 0, scale_y = seq_scale_continuous(cap = "full"), scale_x = seq_scale_genomic(windows = windows, cap = "capped"), 
            aesthetics = aes(axis.x.line = NA, axis.x.ticks = NA)
            ) %+%
  seq_point(data = snv, map(y = dist_to_next_log, color = AF), aes(size = 0.2)) %__%
  seq_track(
    data = cb, 
    windows = windows, 
    track_height = 0.5, track_outer_margin = c(0.05,0.05,0,0), window_inner_margin = 0.01, window_outer_margin = 0, 
    scale_x = seq_scale_genomic(windows = windows, cap = "capped", unit = "Mb", unit.label = "title"), 
    aesthetics = aes(axis.x.labels.text = "Test", axis.x.line = NA)
    ) %+%
  seq_ideogram(style = "rounded", aesthetics = aes(color = "grey", telomere.radius = 1)) -> p

p$plot()
```

## Data Mapping
## Aesthetics
## Wrappers

### Hi-C Plots

```{r, echo=FALSE}
fetchwindows1 = create_genome_windows(c("1"), add_chr = FALSE)
fetchwindows2 = create_genome_windows(c("2"), add_chr = FALSE)
hic <- open_hic("/Volumes/ARC2/01-Inbox/K562/4DNFIDBIEXI7.hic", resolution = 1000000, max_fetch_bp = 300000000)
hic_test <- makeGRangesFromDataFrame(hic$fetch(region1 = fetchwindows1, region2 = fetchwindows2), seqnames.field = "seqnames1", start.field = "start1", end.field = "end1", keep.extra.columns = TRUE)

hic_test$i_start <- start(hic_test)
hic_test$i_end <- end(hic_test)
hic_test$j_start <- hic_test$start2
hic_test$j_end <- hic_test$end2

seq_hic(hic_test, windows = c(fetchwindows1, fetchwindows2), max_dist = 20000000, style = "rectangle")$plot()

```
